de.uka.ilkd.key.rule

Class OneStepSimplifier

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.OneStepSimplifier
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    BuiltInRule, Rule

    public final class OneStepSimplifier
extends java.lang.Object
implements BuiltInRule

    • Constructor Detail

      • OneStepSimplifier

        public OneStepSimplifier()

    • Method Detail

      • shutdownIndices

        public void shutdownIndices()
        Deactivate one-step simplification: clear caches, restore taclets to the goals' taclet indices.

      • isShutdown

        public boolean isShutdown()
        returns true if the indices are shutdown

      • refreshOSS

        public static void refreshOSS(Proof proof)
        Enables or disables the one step simplification, depending on the strategy setting made. IMPORTANT: This won't do any good if called before the strategy has been set / changed for the current proof. So make sure that everything is done in proper order.
        Parameters:
        proof - The Proof for which to refresh the OneStepSimplifier instance.

      • isApplicable

        public boolean isApplicable(Goal goal,
                            PosInOccurrence pio)
        Description copied from interface: BuiltInRule
        returns true iff a rule is applicable at the given position. This does not necessarily mean that a rule application will change the goal (this decision is made due to performance reasons)
        Specified by:
        isApplicable in interface BuiltInRule

      • apply

        public ImmutableList<Goal> apply(Goal goal,
                                 Services services,
                                 RuleApp ruleApp)
        Description copied from interface: Rule
        the rule is applied on the given goal using the information of rule application.
        Specified by:
        apply in interface Rule
        Parameters:
        goal - the Goal on which to apply ruleApp
        services - the Services with the necessary information about the java programs
        ruleApp - the rule application to be executed
        Returns:
        all open goals below \old(goal.node()), i.e. the goals resulting from the rule application

        public Name name()
        Description copied from interface: Rule
        the name of the rule
        Specified by:
        name in interface Rule

      • getCapturedTaclets

        public java.util.Set<NoPosTacletApp> getCapturedTaclets()
        Gets an immutable set containing all the taclets captured by the OSS.
        Returns:
